title: Creating a Marketing Persona for a Healthcare Organization
scenario: Develop a marketing persona for a 45-year-old healthcare professional named Rachel. Rachel is responsible for promoting health and wellness services to her community and is looking for effective marketing strategies that can engage her target audience. Describe Rachel's demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors in a concise and detailed way. Use a format that includes sections for demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors. Keep the description under 220 words.
constraints: Must use a format with sections for demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the marketing persona adhere to the format and word limit requirements?
Is the marketing persona clear and easy to understand?
Does the marketing persona include all necessary information about the target marketing persona?
